questions.text: What does 'Az-Zukhruf' refer to?
questions.answer: Ornaments of gold or worldly luxury.

questions.text: What is the 'Umm al-Kitab' mentioned in Verse 4?
questions.answer: The 'Mother of the Book' (the Preserved Tablet/Lauh al-Mahfuz) with Allah.

questions.text: What should one say when mounting a riding beast or vehicle (Verse 13)?
questions.answer: 'Exalted is He who has subjected this to us, and we could not have otherwise subdued it'.

questions.text: What was the disbelievers' logic for following their ancestors' religion?
questions.answer: They said, 'We found our fathers upon a religion, and we are following in their footsteps'.

questions.text: How did Ibrahim (AS) dissociate himself from his father's idols?
questions.answer: He said, 'Indeed, I am disassociated from that which you worship, except for He who created me'.

questions.text: What did the disbelievers suggest regarding the revelation of the Quran (Verse 31)?
questions.answer: They asked why it wasn't sent down to a 'great man' from one of the two cities (Makkah or Taif).

questions.text: Does Allah divide the mercy of your Lord among people?
questions.answer: Yes, He has apportioned among them their livelihood in the life of this world and raised some in rank.

questions.text: What would Allah have given to the disbelievers if it wouldn't have led all of mankind to become one nation of disbelievers?
questions.answer: Silver roofs for their houses, silver stairs, silver doors, and ornaments of gold.

questions.text: Who is appointed as a companion to the one who turns away from the remembrance of Ar-Rahman?
questions.answer: A devil (Shaytan), who becomes his constant companion.

questions.text: What will the disbeliever say to his devil companion on the Day of Judgment?
questions.answer: 'Oh, I wish there was between me and you the distance between the east and the west'.

questions.text: What did Pharaoh claim to his people regarding the kingdom of Egypt?
questions.answer: He said, 'Does not the kingdom of Egypt belong to me, and these rivers flowing beneath me?'.

questions.text: How did Pharaoh describe Musa (AS) in a mocking way (Verse 52)?
questions.answer: As one who is 'contemptible' and can 'hardly make himself clear' in speech.

questions.text: What is the status of 'close friends' on the Day of Judgment?
questions.answer: They will be enemies to one another, except for the righteous (Muttaqin).

questions.text: What will the dwellers of Hell call out to 'Malik' (the gatekeeper of Hell)?
questions.answer: 'O Malik, let your Lord put an end to us!' and he will say, 'Indeed, you are to remain'.

questions.text: If Ar-Rahman had a son, what would the Prophet (SAW) be the first to do?
questions.answer: He would be the first to worship him (Verse 81), but Allah is far above such claims.

questions.text: Who knows the 'Secret and the Private Conversation' of people?
questions.answer: Allah, and His messengers (angels) are with them recording.

questions.text: Is the one who created the heavens and earth the same as the One who is God in heaven and God on earth?
questions.answer: Yes, He is the Wise, the Knowing.

questions.text: What will happen to the 'Hour' (Day of Judgment)?
questions.answer: It will come suddenly while they perceive not.

questions.text: How are the people of Paradise described in Verse 70-71?
questions.answer: They enter Paradise with their spouses, rejoicing, with golden trays and cups circulated among them.

questions.text: What is the final instruction to the Prophet regarding the disbelievers?
questions.answer: Turn away from them and say 'Peace', for they will eventually come to know.
